title: Multi agent AI Trading Floor - School Project
author: Outrageous_Aspect919
selftext:
Hello,

I built a multi agent AI trading floor for a school project: 10 agents (news, research, macro, crowd sim, trading…)

Running 100% locally on Ollama, Gemma 4:26b, qwen3.6:35b, gemma4:31b. no paid APIs. Daily PDF reports + live pixel-art floor view. Kicks off at 12pm PST every day and takes about 3.5 hours to run.

Looking for feedback!

Educational, not advice.

[https://agenttradingfloor.com/](https://agenttradingfloor.com/) click on the printer for reports!

comments.author: Otherwise_Wave9374
comments.body:
This is a really cool build for a school project, especially running it fully local. The daily PDF reports + a "floor" view is such a nice way to make multi-agent behavior legible.

Do you have a simple eval for whether the agents are adding signal vs just narrating (like, compare returns or decision quality against a single-agent baseline)?

We have been collecting some lightweight multi-agent eval ideas here if helpful: https://www.agentixlabs.com/
